query:
-- Buscar leads com padrões de teste
SELECT id, nome, telefone, email, status, corretor_id, created_at
FROM leads
WHERE 
  nome LIKE '%Teste%' 
  OR nome LIKE '%Lead Rank%'
  OR nome LIKE '%Roleta%'
  OR nome LIKE '%Webhook%'
  OR telefone LIKE '11777777777%'
  OR telefone LIKE '11888888888%'
  OR telefone LIKE '11992%'
  OR email LIKE '%webhook%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;
